steps.title: Identify the slope
steps.content: $F$ is linear in $x$ with slope $\tfrac{9}{5}$, so each $1$-kelvin increase raises $F$ by $\tfrac{9}{5}$ degrees.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $13.86$; substituting or interpreting it in the original condition satisfies the requirement, so $13.86$ is the value to enter.
